creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Thu Mar 14 11:38:15 2013
New Revision: 314148
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314148

Log:
  Falcon is a high-performance Python framework for building cloud APIs.
  It tries to do as little as possible while remaining highly effective.
  
  WWW: http://falconframework.org/
  
  PR:		ports/176380
  Submitted by:	Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/www/py-falcon/
  head/www/py-falcon/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-falcon/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-falcon/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-falcon/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Thu Mar 14 11:35:58 2013	(r314147)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Thu Mar 14 11:38:15 2013	(r314148)
@@ -1511,6 +1511,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-dojango
     SUBDIR += py-dotcloud.cli
     SUBDIR += py-dtflickr
+    SUBDIR += py-falcon
     SUBDIR += py-fcgi
     SUBDIR += py-fedex
     SUBDIR += py-feedfinder

Added: head/www/py-falcon/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/py-falcon/Makefile	Thu Mar 14 11:38:15 2013	(r314148)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Created by: Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	falcon
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.1
+CATEGORIES=	www python
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	lichray@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	High-performance Python framework for building cloud APIs
+
+LICENSE=	AL2
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	cython>=0.11.2:${PORTSDIR}/lang/cython
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}testtools>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-testtools \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}six>=1.1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-six
+
+USE_PYTHON=	2.7+
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+PYEASYINSTALL_ARCHDEP=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/www/py-falcon/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/py-falcon/distinfo	Thu Mar 14 11:38:15 2013	(r314148)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (falcon-0.1.1.tar.gz) = ae8c808fda19e8d05f1bdd6ac3f70451992c8c001840830fbba3f0e907390bdc
+SIZE (falcon-0.1.1.tar.gz) = 19789

Added: head/www/py-falcon/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/py-falcon/pkg-descr	Thu Mar 14 11:38:15 2013	(r314148)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+Falcon is a high-performance Python framework for building cloud APIs.
+It tries to do as little as possible while remaining highly effective.
+
+WWW: http://falconframework.org/
